title: Analyses des résultats électoraux de la circonscription 92-13
text:
library(tidyverse)

── Attaching core tidyverse packages ──────────────────────── tidyverse 2.0.0 ──
✔ dplyr     1.2.1     ✔ readr     2.2.0
✔ forcats   1.0.1     ✔ stringr   1.6.0
✔ ggplot2   4.0.3     ✔ tibble    3.3.1
✔ lubridate 1.9.5     ✔ tidyr     1.3.2
✔ purrr     1.2.2     
── Conflicts ────────────────────────────────────────── tidyverse_conflicts() ──
✖ dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
✖ dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
ℹ Use the conflicted package (<http://conflicted.r-lib.org/>) to force all conflicts to become errors

palette_nuances <- c(
    "LEXD" = "black",
    "LDVD" = "royalblue2",
    "LUD" = "royalblue4",
    "LUDI" = "deepskyblue3",
    "LDVC" = "steelblue",
    "LDIV" = "goldenrod2",
    "LDVG" = "orchid",
    "LUG" = "deeppink3",
    "LFI" = "firebrick2"
)

communes9213 <- c(
    "Antony",
    "Bourg-la-Reine",
    "Châtenay-Malabry",
    "Sceaux"
)

url_sig <- "https://www.data.gouv.fr/api/1/datasets/r/f98165a7-7c37-4705-a181-bcfc943edc73"

sig9213 <- sf::st_read(url_sig) |>
    filter(codeDepartement == "92", nomCommune %in% communes9213)

Reading layer `f98165a7-7c37-4705-a181-bcfc943edc73' from data source 
  `https://www.data.gouv.fr/api/1/datasets/r/f98165a7-7c37-4705-a181-bcfc943edc73' 
  using driver `GeoJSON'
Simple feature collection with 68806 features and 9 fields
Geometry type: MULTIPOLYGON
Dimension:     XY
Bounding box:  xmin: -61.80984 ymin: -21.38963 xmax: 55.83665 ymax: 51.08899
Geodetic CRS:  WGS 84

df <- arrow::read_parquet(
    "https://opendata.hauts-de-seine.fr/api/explore/v2.1/catalog/datasets/resultats-des-elections-par-bureau-de-vote/exports/parquet?lang=fr&timezone=Europe%2FBerlin",
    col_select = c(
        "election", "type", "annee", "tour", "code_circonscription", "circonscription", "commune", "code_insee", "code_bureau_vote", "inscrits", "abstentions", "votants", "blancs_et_nuls", "blancs", "nuls", "exprimes", "num_panneau", "candidat_ou_liste", "sexe", "nom", "prenom", "voix", "code_canton", "canton", "code_nuance", "candidat_ou_liste_nuance", "nom_source", "prenom_source", "code_sigle"
    )
) |>
    mutate(
        across(
            c(
                election,
                type,
                commune,
                code_bureau_vote,
                candidat_ou_liste,
                code_nuance
            ),
            as_factor
        ),
        annee = as_factor(year(annee))
    ) |>
    filter(
        election == "Municipales 2026 - 1er tour",
        commune %in%
            str_to_upper(stringi::stri_trans_general(
                communes9213,
                "Latin-ASCII"
            ))
    ) |>
    select(commune, code_bureau_vote, inscrits, exprimes, voix, nom, code_nuance) |>
    mutate(
        code_nuance = factor(
            code_nuance,
            levels = names(palette_nuances)
        ),
    )

df |>
    select(commune, nom, code_nuance) |>
    distinct() |>
    knitr::kable()




commune
nom
code_nuance

title: Analyses des résultats électoraux de la circonscription 92-13

library(tidyverse)

── Attaching core tidyverse packages ──────────────────────── tidyverse 2.0.0 ──

✖ dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()

    "LEXD" = "black",
    "LDVD" = "royalblue2",

    "LDIV" = "goldenrod2",

)

    "Antony",
    "Bourg-la-Reine",
    "Châtenay-Malabry",
    "Sceaux"

    filter(codeDepartement == "92", nomCommune %in% communes9213)

    )

title: Analyses des résultats électoraux de la circonscription 92-13
text:
Histogramme

df |>
    summarise(voix = sum(voix), .by = c(commune, nom, code_nuance)) |>
    ggplot(aes(x = commune, y = voix, fill = code_nuance)) +
    geom_col(position = "stack", color = "grey") +
    coord_flip() +
    theme_minimal() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = palette_nuances) +
    ggtitle("Voix par nuance", "Municipales 2026 - 1er tour - Communes 92-13")







df |>
    summarise(voix = sum(voix), .by = c(commune, nom, code_nuance)) |>
    ggplot(aes(x = commune, y = voix, fill = code_nuance)) +
    geom_col(position = "fill", color = "grey") +
    coord_flip() +
    theme_minimal() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = palette_nuances) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_percent()) +
    ggtitle("Pourcentage par nuance", "Municipales 2026 - 1er tour - Communes 92-13")
